design_philosophy: Cyberpunk sci-fi HUD UI with high-contrast neon colors on deep void backgrounds. Emphasis on holographic transparency, grid-based modular layouts, hard-edged containers, and futuristic typography.

font_families.heading: Orbitron, Share Tech Mono, or System Monospace
font_families.body: Rajdhani, Roboto Mono, or System Sans-Serif

spacing_and_layout.radius: 0px or minimal 4px (hard edges preferred for cyberpunk)

buttons.primary: Transparent background, solid neon border (e.g., #00F0FF), uppercase text. On press: fill with neon color and black text. Consider adding a small angle cut effect if achievable via styles.
buttons.secondary: No border, neon text, chevron indicators (e.g., '> CLICK HERE').

status_bars.style: HUD segmented progress bars. Outer container has 1px border. 6 Bars: Health (Red), Hunger (Orange), Hygiene (Cyan), Energy (Yellow), Social (Purple), Mood (Magenta).

cards_and_panels.style: Dark surface (#121220) with a 1px border (#00F0FF at 20% opacity). Use hard rectangular shapes.

inputs.style: Bottom border only or fully boxed with hard 0px radius. Focus state turns border bright neon cyan or magenta.

bottom_tab_navigation.style: Dark background (#050509) with top border (#00F0FF 30% opacity). Active tab text/icon glows cyan.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Snappy, sudden changes rather than slow easing (mimics digital glitches/HUD updates).
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons and list items glow or inverse colors on press/active.

image_urls.description: Dark neon city night, ideal for the background of the Login/Signup screen. Apply a dark overlay (rgba(5,5,9,0.85)) to ensure form readability.
Neon lit portrait for the Character screen avatar. Place inside a cyberpunk frame/border.

specific_screens.login_signup: Full screen background image with heavy dark overlay. Holographic logo or title ('LIFETRACK_OS'). Inputs with neon accents.
specific_screens.character_screen: Avatar at top, framed by HUD elements. 6 Status bars underneath (Health, Hunger, Hygiene, Energy, Social, Mood) with [-] and [+] buttons to adjust. Overall Level and XP displayed prominently in a futuristic badge.
specific_screens.skills_screen: Customizable list of skills. Each skill has an XP progress bar and current 'giant' level. 'Add Skill' button with hacker-aesthetic.
specific_screens.quests_screen: List of user-created quests. Checkboxes are neon squares. Completion strikes through text and triggers an XP reward. Option to create quests with assigned XP.
specific_screens.profile: Settings, log out, user stats overview.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as an Expo React Native mobile app using .js files ONLY.
Use standard React Native components (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList).
Implement styling via StyleSheet.create() or inline styles. Do NOT use Tailwind classes unless Nativewind is explicitly configured in the project.
Add 'testID' attributes to all interactive elements for testing, using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').
Status bars must be interactable with visible +/- controls on the Character Screen.
Ensure the app implements bottom tab navigation mapping to Character, Skills, Quests, and Profile.
State management can be mocked or local for the MVP, but auth and data structures must be in place.
Maintain the cyberpunk dark theme rigidly. No bright white backgrounds anywhere.
